accepted.reason: Clamped linear interpolation between two callable fields is a concise numeric blending kernel.
Explicit finite-difference heat evolution contains practical stencil-style PDE update loops.
Local push updates for residual/score vectors are strong sparse-graph iterative kernels.
Tournament selection with adaptive feasible-function filtering is useful evolutionary search control logic.
Iterative/recursive Fibonacci kernels provide classic recursion-vs-loop optimization patterns.
Elementwise heavy-math transform over dense matrices is a practical compute-kernel baseline.
Polya-Gamma omega and log-likelihood updates are high-value latent-variable model kernels.
FFA shift-add butterfly stages are strong signal-processing style dynamic folding kernels.

skipped.reason: Depends on external `breakage` implementation and tightly coupled Jacobian construction details.
